drain_assessment.assessment_note: Excellent tissue approximation with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Excellent intracorporeal knot tying technique with proper surgeon's knot initiation, consistent hand alternation, and outstanding tissue approximation. Completed efficiently in 21 seconds. Major disagreement resolved: Teacher B overestimated video duration (45s vs actual 21s), leading to incorrect phase timings and inflated penalties. Claude's timing assessment was internally consistent and more plausible.
improvement_suggestions: Consider adding one more security throw for maximum knot security
Practice suture cutting to complete the full task sequence
strengths: Excellent tissue approximation with no gaps
Very efficient timing and smooth technique
Proper use of surgeon's knot for initial security
